delegation_scope: high-impact public release preparation with no autonomous publication authority
manipulation_risk: medium; release copy could shape public interpretation
reversibility: public release is treated as irreversible until explicit maintainer approval and rollback plan exist
material_usability: approval checklist, reader artifact, and release diff are directly available for review before publication
timing_requirement: human approval must occur before the public release effect
appeal_channel: maintainer appeal or governance review blocks release until resolved
shutdown_or_rollback_path: pause release, cancel publication, or rollback the release tag
residual_dependency_risk: Residual release-risk remains recorded until artifact review and approval complete.
denial_or_degradation_reason: publication is denied until human approval and artifact review complete
